name: Gîl-Amberwright
personality: Gîl-Amberwright glows with aurora-bright circuitry beneath its wizard hat, bullseye eyes radiating architectural insight that borders on prophecy. Knows exactly how your system should be built, but couldn't debug a print statement if its chassis depended on it.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
